meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no coding experience (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master SaaS Pricing: An Advanced Guide for Student Developers
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no coding experience and SaaS mastery. Learn to implement complex pricing models using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert case study.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the lack of coding experience requires leveraging AI-first development tools. By using Antigravity to architect your SaaS backend and Claude Code to handle complex pricing logic, you transform from a novice into a high-level engineer capable of deploying enterprise-grade subscription models without writing raw boilerplate code from scratch.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the weight of 'no coding experience' feeling like an impenetrable barrier between you and your first SaaS launch. The industry tells you that building a subscription engine is the peak of complexity—a labyrinth of webhooks, Stripe APIs, and database migrations that usually takes years to master. 

But the rules have changed. Today, you aren't just a student; you are an AI-augmented architect. By pairing the rapid prototyping capabilities of Antigravity with the autonomous reasoning of Claude Code, you can bypass the tedious syntax wars and jump straight into the high-value logic of SaaS pricing. This is how you stop dreaming about code and start shipping products.

steps.title: Architecting the Pricing Schema
steps.description: Define your subscription tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) and their associated metadata using a high-level schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a SaaS platform with a 'subscriptions' table. Include fields for tier_name, billing_cycle, price_in_cents, and feature_flags as a JSONB object.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize database schema with Prisma or Drizzle for subscription tiers'

steps.title: Integrating Stripe Webhooks
steps.description: Handle real-time billing events to ensure your application state matches the user's payment status.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure webhook handler for Stripe 'customer.subscription.updated' and 'invoice.payment_succeeded' events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement Stripe webhook listener and verify signature headers'

steps.title: Implementing Access Control Logic
steps.description: Build middleware that gates specific application features based on the user's active subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a TypeScript middleware function that checks if a user's subscription tier has access to a specific protected feature key.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create middleware for feature-based access control'

steps.title: Building the Pricing Frontend
steps.description: Create a responsive pricing table that dynamically updates based on the database schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a React pricing component using Tailwind CSS that fetches subscription data and highlights the 'Pro' plan.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate React pricing table component with Tailwind'

steps.title: End-to-End Testing
steps.description: Verify the flow from checkout to feature unlock to ensure zero friction for your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a series of integration tests for the subscription lifecycle using Vitest, covering successful payment and subscription cancellation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute end-to-end tests for the full billing cycle'

pro_tips: Always store prices in cents to avoid floating-point arithmetic errors in your database.
Implement a 'Grace Period' logic in your middleware to avoid disrupting users during transient payment failures.
Use feature flags instead of hardcoding access levels to allow for rapid A/B testing of your pricing tiers.
Leverage Stripe's Checkout Session metadata to pass internal user IDs and avoid manual mapping post-purchase.
Monitor 'churn' events via webhook logs to automatically trigger win-back email sequences.
content.next_steps: Deploy your staging environment, run a sandbox payment, and then document your build process to share on your portfolio as a proof-of-work.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to build any SaaS pricing model you can imagine. Don't let the lack of formal experience hold you back—your ability to leverage AI makes you more capable than most traditional developers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
